prompt: For a protein engineering research program, generate a tight-binding protein binder targeting Membrane protein (viral membrane protein) expressed by Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2. The binder should achieve sub-nanomolar binding. specify a protocol for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using RoseTTAFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Membrane protein; organism: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2; catalogue version v1.0
